episodes.title: The Blank Slate
episodes.description: A crumbling concrete pad becomes a full outdoor kitchen in just five days.

episodes.title: The Pergola Problem
episodes.description: A family needs shade — and ends up with a pergola that doubles as a bar.

episodes.title: Treehouse Rules
episodes.description: Two kids, one massive oak, and a build that has to pass an engineer's inspection.

episodes.title: Water Feature
episodes.description: A residential pond build encounters unexpected clay soil and a very opinionated koi.

episodes.title: Small Space, Big Ideas
episodes.description: A postage-stamp city yard becomes a complete outdoor room with vertical gardening.

episodes.title: Fire & Seating
episodes.description: A custom fire pit surrounded by built-in seating transforms a bare backyard overnight.

episodes.title: The Greenhouse
episodes.description: A retired couple wants a proper growing greenhouse — the foundation turns out to be the hard part.

episodes.title: Sports Court
episodes.description: Pouring a regulation half-court in a residential backyard: the engineering challenge no one expected.

episodes.title: Fence It In
episodes.description: A privacy fence project grows into a full perimeter redesign with landscape lighting.

episodes.title: Year One Finale
episodes.description: Revisiting the first four builds one year later — what held up, what needed fixing.

episodes.title: Pandemic Projects
episodes.description: Families suddenly home all day need their yards to do more — and fast.

episodes.title: The Outdoor Office
episodes.description: A fully weather-sealed, wired outdoor workspace in a suburban backyard.

episodes.title: Swimming Hole
episodes.description: A natural-style swimming pond with planted filtration instead of chemicals.

episodes.title: Rooftop Garden
episodes.description: A city apartment building converts its rooftop into a shared garden for twelve families.

episodes.title: Slide Rule
episodes.description: A custom residential water slide build that definitely requires a structural engineer.

episodes.title: The Food Forest
episodes.description: Planting a seven-layer food forest on a suburban half-acre lot.

episodes.title: Raised Right
episodes.description: Eight raised beds, irrigation, and a tool shed in a weekend for a family going fully food-independent.

episodes.title: Season Two Finale
episodes.description: The biggest, most complex build of the season — a full outdoor kitchen with covered dining room.

extras.title: Tool Guide
extras.description: Every major tool used across the season, explained by the lead carpenter.

extras.title: One Year Later
extras.description: Revisit the builds from season one to see what's thriving and what needed work.
